My dog, Dexter

Dexter

Dexter is a Soft Coated Wheaten Terrier. He loves going to the beach, where he gets to run and chase seagulls.

Dexter earned a Dogtorate in Economics. His dissertation, titled Essays on Treat Demand and Cuddle Supply, combines theory and experiments to estimate human willingness to pay for cuddles.
